recipes.name: Best Instrumental
recipes.description: Guide-first instrumental workflow: instrument-preserving Unwa V1e with Becruily phase-fix cleanup.
recommended_for: Songs where fullness matters more than raw speed
recipes.workflow_summary: Separate with Unwa V1e, then phase-fix instrumental using Becruily Vocal at 500-5000 Hz.
recipes.source: Guide-derived simple workflow refreshed from the 2026-03 guide revision

fallback_policy.reason: Fallback to Demucs if preferred guide pair is unavailable.

recipes.name: Best Vocals
recipes.description: Balanced vocal workflow updated to the guide's newer clean-vocal ensemble.
recommended_for: Backing-vocal-heavy tracks where 5e gets too noisy
recipes.workflow_summary: Average blend of Unwa Big Beta 6X and Gabox Voc FV4, matching the guide's newer balanced vocal pairing.
recipes.source: Guide-derived vocal ensemble refreshed from the 2026-03 guide revision

recipes.name: Bleedless Karaoke
recipes.description: Guide-recommended karaoke fusion for backing-track cleanup and lead/back prep.
contraindications: Single-click quick previews on low-end systems
recipes.workflow_summary: Max-spec fusion of Becruily and Anvuew karaoke Roformers, aligned with the guide's common backing-vocal ensemble.

recipes.name: Karaoke Harmonies
recipes.description: Newer guide-favored karaoke preset for fuller BGV and harmony-focused extraction.
recommended_for: Tracks where older karaoke models sound too thin
contraindications: General one-click karaoke export when maximum stability matters more than fullness
recipes.workflow_summary: Runs Small Karaoke GaboxAuf, a newer guide-highlighted karaoke model noted for fuller output and better BGV differentiation.
recipes.source: Guide-derived karaoke preset refreshed from the 2026-03 guide revision

recipes.name: Live Restoration
recipes.description: Closest shipped restoration chain to the guide's live rescue flow.
recommended_for: Removing room sound before separation or export
contraindications: Tracks where preserving ambience is important
recipes.workflow_summary: Apply room dereverb first, then aggressive denoise for final polish.

recipes.name: Drums
recipes.description: Guide-backed local drum split workflow.
recipes.workflow_summary: Runs MDX23C DrumSep 5-stem as the local drum specialist.

recipes.name: Bass
recipes.description: Low-end definition workflow for sub-bass and natural decay.
recipes.workflow_summary: Uses SCNet Large for the guide's preferred bass-focused output.

recipes.name: Fast Preview
recipes.description: Product utility preset for quick low-cost judging before running a heavier guide workflow.
recommended_for: Fast A/B checks before premium workflows
contraindications: Final export where maximum quality matters
recipes.workflow_summary: Uses MDX23C InstVoc HQ as the fastest reliable preview baseline before committing to a heavier guide workflow.
recipes.source: Product utility preset (not a guide flagship workflow)

recipes.name: Ultimate Instrumental (Max Spec)
recipes.description: High-detail advanced ensemble with more bleed/noise risk.
recipes.workflow_summary: Max-spec blend of Unwa, Gabox and ViperX for aggressive detail recovery.

recipes.name: Ultimate Inst (FNO + Becruily)
recipes.description: Experimental advanced ensemble that depends on FNO runtime support.
recommended_for: Advanced users with verified neuralop/FNO1d runtime
recipes.workflow_summary: FNO precision mixed with Becruily and V1e for experimental detail/cleanliness.

recipes.name: Instrumental Phase Fixer (Unwa + Kim)
recipes.description: Advanced two-model phase-fix ensemble for fuller instrumentals.
recommended_for: Instrumentals where Kim is a better phase companion than Becruily
recipes.workflow_summary: Phase-fix algorithm using Unwa magnitude and Kim phase guidance.

recipes.name: Gabox Resurrection (Phase Fix)
recipes.description: Advanced cleanup workflow using Gabox Resurrection body with ViperX phase.
recommended_for: Users preferring Resurrection body over V1e tone
recipes.workflow_summary: Phase-fix Gabox Resurrection against ViperX for cleaner full-body instrumentals.

recipes.name: Vocal Max Spec (Unwa + Becruily)
recipes.description: Fullness-first vocal ensemble for advanced use.
recommended_for: Vocals that sound too thin with cleaner models
recipes.workflow_summary: Max-spec vocal blend for maximum body and breath detail.

recipes.name: Super Clean Vocals (Pipeline)
recipes.description: Dereverb before vocal extraction for difficult material.
recipes.workflow_summary: Dereverb first, then run ViperX for a cleaner vocal source.

recipes.name: Demudder (Metal/Rock)
recipes.description: Advanced instrumental cleanup for dense arrangements.
recipes.workflow_summary: Runs demudder phase-rotate cleanup after a ViperX pass.
recipes.warning: May cause OOM on low-VRAM systems.

recipes.name: DeBleed Instrumental
recipes.description: Advanced debleed chain for removing remaining vocals from an instrumental.
recipes.workflow_summary: Run ViperX first, then catch residual bleed with Kim.

recipes.name: Vocal Low Cut Cleanup
recipes.description: Simple post-processing cleanup for rumble and low-frequency bleed.
recommended_for: Removing rumble from vocals after separation
contraindications: Material where low-end vocal energy is important
recipes.workflow_summary: High-pass cleanup after a ViperX vocal pass.

recipes.name: Hybrid Frequency Split
recipes.description: Advanced hybrid using SCNet lows and Unwa highs.
recipes.workflow_summary: SCNet supplies lows while Unwa supplies highs via frequency split.

fallback_policy.reason: Use balanced crossover settings when custom split is unstable.

recipes.name: Ultimate Instrumental
recipes.description: Guide-aligned flagship chain: fullness-first instrumental, then phase-fix and debleed cleanup.
contraindications: Systems missing the cleanup companion models
recipes.workflow_summary: Unwa V1e for body, Becruily Vocal for phase-fix reference, then Gabox DeBleed for final cleanup.

fallback_policy.reason: Fall back to Demucs cleanup when guide-specific models are missing.

recipes.name: Hybrid Instrumental Crossover
recipes.description: Low-band SCNet plus high-band Roformer hybrid around the guide-favored 1 kHz region.
recommended_for: Dense mixes with weak low end
contraindications: Users who want a one-click safe workflow
recipes.workflow_summary: SCNet supplies lows, Unwa HyperACE supplies highs, with crossover validation near 1000 Hz.

fallback_policy.reason: Fallback to balanced crossover when custom split is unstable.

recipes.name: Ultimate Vocals
recipes.description: Guide-curated vocal chain that keeps Big Beta 5e body while cleaning it up with Becruily Vocal.
recommended_for: Vocals that sound thin with purely clean models
Modern guide-style fullness plus cleanup blends
recipes.workflow_summary: Max-spec style pair of Unwa Big Beta 5e and Becruily Vocal, reflecting a guide-listed fullness plus cleanup ensemble.

recipes.name: Karaoke Lead/Back
recipes.description: Guide-style karaoke chain: create a strong karaoke base, then refine lead/back separation.
recipes.workflow_summary: Anvuew Karaoke builds the base backing track, then ViperX Karaoke and Mel-Band Karaoke refine the vocal split.

recipes.name: Karaoke Harmony Recovery
recipes.description: Karaoke-first chain biased toward harmonies, BGVs and duet material.
recipes.workflow_summary: Start with Becruily Karaoke, then use Aufr33/Mel-Band and Apollo Vocal when available to retain backing harmonies.

recipes.name: Restoration Chain
recipes.description: Guide-backed restoration sequence: dereverb first, denoise second.
contraindications: Clean studio stems that need ambience preserved
recipes.workflow_summary: Anvuew Room Dereverb first, then Aufr33 Aggressive Denoise.

recipes.name: Separated Vocal Restoration
recipes.description: Separate first, then run restoration on the vocal stem for harder material.
recipes.workflow_summary: Separate vocals with ViperX, dereverb the vocal stem, then denoise.

recipes.name: Bass Definition Hybrid
recipes.description: Bass-first hybrid using SCNet definition with Demucs support for sustain and glue.
recipes.workflow_summary: SCNet supplies precise low-end definition while HTDemucs FT restores sustain and natural decay.

recipes.name: Drum Extraction Plus Cleanup
recipes.description: Guide-driven drum extraction with an optional cleanup pass for spill reduction.
contraindications: Users who only need a full instrumental
recipes.workflow_summary: Split drums with MDX23C DrumSep, then use Demucs or DeBleed if extra spill cleanup is needed.

recipes.name: Demucs Secondary Pass
recipes.description: Use Demucs as a secondary pass when the main workflow leaves gaps or awkward bleed.
recommended_for: Body recovery after a cleaner model
recipes.workflow_summary: Run a cleaner primary model first, then use HTDemucs FT as a recovery or comparison pass.

recipes.name: Special Stem Guitar
recipes.description: Special-stem chain for guitar-focused extraction with optional Demucs extension.
recipes.workflow_summary: Start with Becruily Guitar, then use HTDemucs 6S when special-stem extension is installed.

recipes.name: Precision Dereverb
recipes.description: Guide-tracked dereverb workflow built around the newer Anvuew BS dereverb release.
recipes.quality_tradeoff: Higher dereverb focus with less tolerance for mismatched source material.
contraindications: One-click simple mode promotion before golden-set QA exists
recipes.workflow_summary: Runs the newer Anvuew BS dereverb model as a focused restoration pass.

recipes.name: Duality Harmony Split
recipes.description: Advanced backing-vocal and harmony workflow built around Duality V2.
recipes.quality_tradeoff: Fuller BGV/harmony recovery at the cost of higher instability and manual runtime setup.
recipes.workflow_summary: Tracks the guide's Duality V2 path for harmony and backing-vocal separation.

recipes.name: Male/Female Duet Split
recipes.description: Advanced special-stem workflow for separating male and female vocal lines.
recipes.quality_tradeoff: Highly specialized split that remains manual/advanced until assets and QA are locked down.
recipes.workflow_summary: Uses the tracked Sucial male/female model for specialized duet separation.

recipes.name: Crowd Ambience Cleanup
recipes.description: Advanced crowd and ambience reduction chain tracked from the guide.
recipes.quality_tradeoff: Targets crowd/ambience aggressively and can over-clean dry sources.
recipes.workflow_summary: Runs the Mel-Band crowd model as a focused ambience cleanup pass.

recipes.name: Phantom Center Dual Beta2
recipes.description: Tracked phantom-center workflow for the new Gilliaan MonoStereo Dual Beta2 candidate.
recipes.quality_tradeoff: Experimental stereo mapping workflow that stays blocked until candidate validation is complete.
recipes.workflow_summary: Captures the newest phantom-center guide candidate as an explicit advanced workflow placeholder.

recipes.name: Vocal Mag Focus
recipes.description: Tracked advanced vocal workflow for Anvuew's BS_RoFormer_mag candidate.
recipes.quality_tradeoff: Potentially stronger vocal magnitude accuracy with still-unverified runtime packaging.
recipes.workflow_summary: Registers the BS_RoFormer_mag guide candidate as an advanced workflow target for future QA.
